title: Mark Haacker's Memorial Service
description: Before Mark moved to Florida, he was an active member of Biker Church and gladly used his talent on the drums to honor the Lord. 2 wheels or 4 wheels, please come if you can.

title: Blow Up the Attendance at a Small Church

description: Just south of Brighton Rd. across from Blvd. Mall, PD doing the sermon at Cornerstone Community Church (84 Capen Blvd) @ 10 am
